case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, MERCHANT ACCOUNT SERVICES VS KHOUNG, ANGELA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, MERCHANT ACCOUNT SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KHOUNG, ANGELA CHUANG, JOHN PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY DEFENDANT $68.00 COURT COSTS.
